status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Configure C9300 VLANs, trunks, and SVI
features.user_visible_behavior: C9300 has all 7 VLANs, correct trunk configs, and can ping FortiGate 10.10.10.2
verification: show interfaces trunk shows correct allowed VLANs
show ip interface brief shows Vlan10 up/up
evidence: Session 001: ping 10.10.10.2 source vlan10 returned 5/5
2026-05-29 live C9300 FortiGate trunk TwentyFiveGigE2/1/2 updated additively from 10,11,100 to 10,11,30,40,50,60,100; VLAN10 ping to FortiGate remained OK

2026-05-31 live C9300 verification passed against data/network-plan.json: VLANs present, FortiGate trunk 10,11,30,40,50,60,100, Proxmox trunks 3,10,11,30,40,50,60, Vlan10 up/up, ping 10.10.10.2 source vlan10 OK
2026-05-31 C9300 write memory completed after verification; post-save verification still passed
features.notes: Running-config validated and saved with write memory on 2026-05-31. FortiGate trunk carries 10,11,30,40,50,60,100. Proxmox-facing trunks Te2/0/39, Te2/0/41, and Te2/0/46 carry 3,10,11,30,40,50,60.

features.title: Confirm FortiGate parent interface & create VLAN interfaces
features.user_visible_behavior: FortiGate tracks live VLAN 10 as hlvl, keeps VLAN 99 on mgt, and adds only routed VLAN gateways 30,40,50,60 after trunk review
verification: FortiGate VLAN plan template renders successfully
show system interface shows hlvl, mgt, and routed VLAN interfaces 30,40,50,60
evidence: Added fortinet.fortios collection requirements, FortiGate inventory, group_vars intent, discovery playbook, render-plan playbook, and gated apply playbook
Static YAML validation passed for 5 Ansible YAML files
Jinja render validation passed for ansible/templates/fortigate/vlan-interface-plan.md.j2

2026-05-28 read-only verification: API reachable at https://10.99.99.2:7443; 41 interfaces seen; x2 is VLAN parent; hlvl VLAN10 exists with 10.10.10.2/24; VLANs 20,30,40,50,60 are missing; VLAN99 target conflicts with mgt hard-switch 10.99.99.2/24
2026-05-29 repo/live comparison recorded in docs/fortigate-repo-live-comparison-2026-05-29.md
2026-05-29 adopted live FortiGate names: hlvl tracks VLAN10, mgt tracks VLAN99, VLAN20 excluded from FortiGate routing, and only VLANs 30,40,50,60 remain as FortiGate candidates
2026-05-29 read-only verification after intent update: hlvl and mgt matched; VLANs 30,40,50,60 are the only missing FortiGate targets
2026-05-29 FortiGate apply created vsvc VLAN30, vapps VLAN40, vlab VLAN50, and vdmz VLAN60 on parent x2; post-apply API verification showed 6/6 target matches
2026-05-30 FortiGate discovery via service account: 6/6 interfaces match; 0 homelab policies pre-apply

2026-05-30 FortiGate policy apply: 4 address objects, 4 zones (VSVC/VAPPS/VLAB/VDMZ), 7 Phase B firewall policies; 15/15 operations ok in fortigate-policy-apply.json; post-apply 7 zones and 12 total policies

2026-05-30 Codex approval: Composer FortiGate running-config policy implementation approved after baseline init, read-only rediscovery, 6/6 interface match, 15/15 apply operations ok, and policy IDs 10-16 present; persistent save deferred pending guest/client validation

2026-05-30 Session 021: VM 444 E2E validated on vlab/VLAN 50 — DHCP lease 10.10.50.10 via FortiGate ID=8, pingable from workstation, gateway 10.10.50.2 reachable. MikroTik broadcast fix resolved previous blocker.
features.notes: Live FortiGate VLAN interfaces 30,40,50,60 up on x2. Address objects, zones, Phase B inter-VLAN policies applied and Codex-approved for running-config. FortiGate DHCP server on vlab (ID=8) now successfully leasing to VM 444 (10.10.50.10). E2E VLAN 50 validation complete: VM → MikroTik → C9300 → FortiGate path proven. Persistent save deferred pending final approval.

features.title: Proxmox SDN discovery and configuration
features.user_visible_behavior: Proxmox SDN zone ztrunk and VNets exist on nodes A,B,D; nodeF pending
verification: ip -br link shows VNet interfaces on all nodes
vmbr0 is VLAN-aware on all nodes
evidence: API discovery: 4 nodes (nodeA,nodeB,nodeD,nodeF), OVS vmbr0 confirmed
SDN zone ztrunk created on vmbr0
6 VNets: vmgmt(10), vstore(20), vsvc(30), vapps(40), vlab(50), vdmz(60)
OVS trunks synced from live: nodeA=en10basep2, nodeB=ennic1s1, nodeD=eno1, nodeF=sfp1
nodeA/B/D trunk: 3,10,11,30,40,50,60 | nodeF trunk: 10,11,30,40,50,60 (VLAN 3 via dedicated vmbr3)
2026-05-29 Proxmox/FortiGate gateway validation: SDN gateway checks OK for vsvc/vapps/vlab/vdmz and OVS trunk checks OK for nodeA/nodeB/nodeD/nodeF
2026-05-29 VM 444 sg-hl-vm01 attached additively to vlab as net1 on nodeF; validator sees VM 444 on vlab but guest-agent ping is unavailable

2026-05-30 VM 444 NICs re-added (had been removed); net0 working on VLAN 10 (10.10.10.25 reachable); net1 on vlab sends DHCP discovers but receives no response (MikroTik broadcast isolation suspected)

2026-05-30 Session 021: After MikroTik fix, VM 444 received DHCP lease on vlab: 10.10.50.10 (MAC bc24.11d2.5afe, sg-hl-vm01). Workstation → VM 10.10.50.10 ping 3/3. Workstation → FortiGate 10.10.50.2 ping 3/3. E2E VLAN 50 connectivity validated.
features.notes: Repo synced from live Proxmox 2026-05-28. All 4 nodes have OVS trunk ports with SDN zone + 6 VNets active cluster-wide. 2026-05-30 Session 021: VM 444 E2E validated on vlab/VLAN 50 — DHCP lease obtained from FortiGate (10.10.50.10), pingable from workstation (3/3). FortiGate vlab gateway 10.10.50.2 also reachable (3/3). Guest agent still unavailable but connectivity proven via cross-platform pings.
